comments.text: Don't forget to Subscribe and hit Thumbs up!👍❤

Your numbers are misleading because they are calculated as if someone can trade 24 hours a day, every day, for 30 days straight. Nobody trades 24/7. Realistically, a trader can only be active during key sessions — for example, 10–12 hours a day during London and New York. Because of this, the statistics in the video are not accurate. I’m not saying the strategy isn’t profitable, but the results shouldn’t be based on 24/7 trading.
Does this work on other pairs??🙏🙏😀

I have learnt lots n tons of ICT/SMC concepts in the past 3 months as I started trading along the way. I am more prone to M1 scalping. With the knowledge learnt, coupled with this 3 EMA ribbon strategy, I tried scalping on XAUUSD M1 chart with M5/M15 charts displayed on the screen, buy or sell depending on the breakout, with 1 or 2 lots each breakout have helped me extracted $2K daily from the market for the past 2 days, not bad for a novice trader like me 🎉. By the way, it is too bad that the author has gone MIA as I hope to have more quality videos from him.

More than one year ago, I found this video. I have used the strategy for a while but quit it because of reasonably high broker charges, especially on forex cfd's. Yesterday I remembered your "EMA32 zone" strategy and I thought it deserves a second chance. I am now trading 6E Forex futures with it on a 1-minute chart. Lateron I will also use it on QQQ 2-minute chart. I have ran a series of backtests and they are promising. This morning I have executed two trades on 6E, both succesfull with a R/R 1:1.5  THANK YOU for sharing this wonderful strategy. 🙂
